w:r.w:t: AI-Powered RFP Automation for Enterprise Sales Teams
Responding to enterprise RFPs is one of the most time-consuming, high-stakes activities in B2B sales. Most enterprise teams struggle with:
RFPs contain 200–500 questions, requiring 20–40 hours per response
Answers already exist in previous RFPs but are buried in old documents and email threads
Inconsistent answers across submissions damage credibility with buyers
Presales and BD teams become bottlenecks, slowing deal velocity
Smaller companies often can't compete on RFPs due to sheer bandwidth constraints
A lightweight, AI-powered web application that lets enterprise sales teams respond to RFPs faster, more accurately, and with full consistency. Here is how it works:
Step 1: Upload past RFP responses, product docs, case studies, and compliance certificates
Step 2: The tool indexes all content into a searchable AI knowledge base
Step 3: Upload or paste a new RFP — the tool auto-drafts answers question by question
Step 4: Each answer cites the source document it drew from
Step 5: A human reviews, edits, and approves before submission
No complex implementation. No lengthy onboarding. Teams are productive within hours of setup.
Simple, proven technologies that keep build cost low and reliability high:
OpenAI GPT-4o or Claude API for answer generation
Pinecone or Weaviate (RAG architecture for document retrieval)
Estimated MVP build cost: $5,000–$15,000 with a freelance developer, or faster with a technical co-founder.
Affordable, usage-based tiers designed for mid-market companies:
At just 10 paying customers on the Growth plan = $8,000 MRR from Day 1.
Enterprise sales and presales teams — core buyer
IT and procurement consulting firms with high RFP volume
Government contractors — extremely high frequency of RFP submissions
Mid-size SaaS companies without dedicated bid management teams
Professional services firms responding to client tenders
Existing solutions are expensive, complex, and built for large enterprises with big budgets:
Our opportunity: Be the AI-first, affordable, fast-deploy alternative for companies that cannot justify $20–30K/year tools.
We have lived this problem firsthand — we are our own ideal customer
Existing network of enterprise sales leaders who face this exact pain daily
We understand what 'good' looks like in a winning RFP response
We can sell the first 5–10 customers personally before writing a single line of code
Deep knowledge of the enterprise buying cycle and what procurement teams look for
